title: AbbVie Wins FDA Approval for Decnupaz in BPDCN
headline: FDA approves AbbVie's Decnupaz (pivekimab sunirine-pvzy), a CD123-directed antibody-alkylating agent conjugate, for blastic plasmacytoid dendritic cell neoplasm on May 27, 2026.
key_facts: BPDCN ~1,000-1,400 cases/year in US; first new mechanism since Elzonris (tagraxofusp) approved 2018; priority review with breakthrough therapy designation granted September 2025; ABBV stock +1.07%

title: Kailera Triple-G Obesity Drug Shows Phase 1 Promise
headline: Kailera Therapeutics and partner Hengrui report Phase 1 data for their GLP-1/GIP/glucagon triple agonist showing potentially greater weight loss than existing dual-agonists, competing with Eli Lilly's retatrutide program.
key_facts: Phase 1 data; triple-agonist mechanism; Eli Lilly completing TRIUMPH program for retatrutide; Hengrui partnership (China)

title: Apogee Lands $800M-$1.3B Blackstone Royalty Deal
headline: Apogee Therapeutics secures up to $1.3B in royalty financing from Blackstone to advance its eczema drug toward Phase 3, competing against Dupixent and Ebglyss.
key_facts: $800M upfront / $1.3B total potential; largest pre-Phase 3 royalty financing deal; new Phase 2 eczema data announced; competitors: Dupixent (~$13B+ annual sales), Ebglyss

title: FDA Delays AstraZeneca Camizestrant PDUFA Decision
headline: FDA extends review of AstraZeneca's camizestrant, an oral SERD for ER+/HER2- breast cancer, after advisory committee found supporting evidence inconclusive.
key_facts: Oral selective estrogen receptor degrader (SERD); ER+/HER2- advanced breast cancer; advisory panel voted inconclusive; competitor Pfizer/Arvinas vepdegestrant (Veppanu) approved May 1, 2026

title: Viridian Signs WuXi Biologics Deal Despite BIOSECURE Act
headline: Viridian Therapeutics partners with WuXi Biologics for manufacturing of its thyroid eye disease drug, defying BIOSECURE Act headwinds affecting Chinese CDMOs.
key_facts: WuXi Biologics manufacturing partner; Viridian awaiting FDA decision (veligrotug); competitor: Amgen's Tepezza in thyroid eye disease; BIOSECURE Act threatens Chinese CDMO relationships

title: Akeso PD-1/VEGF Bispecific Earns ASCO Plenary Slot
headline: Chinese biotech Akeso secures high-profile ASCO 2026 plenary presentation for its PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, signaling rising Chinese competitiveness in oncology.
key_facts: ASCO 2026 plenary session (highest-profile slot); PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody; Chinese-origin company with global ambitions

title: CordenPharma Acquires AmbioPharm Peptide CDMO
headline: CordenPharma announces acquisition of peptide API manufacturer AmbioPharm with US and China manufacturing sites.
key_facts: Peptide API manufacturing; sites in US and China; deal terms not disclosed; relevant to GLP-1 manufacturing bottleneck

title: Eli Lilly Wins Argument Over Noom GLP-1 Dosing Claims
headline: Eli Lilly successfully challenges health app Noom's claims about GLP-1 dosing.
key_facts: Marketing/dosing claim dispute with Noom health app

title: Lilly's Foundayo Trails Novo's Wegovy in Obesity Launch
headline: Competitive intelligence shows Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 drug Foundayo underperforming Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill in early obesity market uptake.
key_facts: Oral GLP-1 competitive comparison; Foundayo vs. Wegovy market share
